name: gorstak-site
description: Static site for gorstak.eu. Projects are loaded from a pre-built file (no GitHub API calls from the browser, avoiding rate limits).

name: Gorstak-Zadar
description: Profile README

name: Update-GitHubDescriptions
description: Bulk-updates GitHub repository descriptions from a dedicated block in each README.md.

name: Zerch
description: HTML page or web utility - in repo root.

name: Troll
description: PowerShell script that removes network bridges - runs at logon via scheduled task. Includes Unbridge.cmd. Part of security/hardening.

name: Spoofer
description: Python privacy/fingerprint spoofing tool - Faker identity, software metadata spoofing, fake sites, clipboard, audio, screen resolution, MAC address, timezone. Uses pyautogui, OpenCV, sounddevice, Faker.

name: Stripper
description: Ultimate Windows ISO Debloater - PowerShell interactive script using wimlib, NTLite preset XML. Mount ISO, apply debloat, rebuild.

name: Security
description: PowerShell Windows Security Suite - comprehensive security hardening and protection scripts.

name: Secpol
description: PowerShell script to harden privilege rights via secedit - SeDenyNetworkLogonRight, SeDenyRemoteInteractiveLogonRight, SeDenyRemoteLogonRight for *S-1-5-11 (Users). Clears SeRemoteShutdownPrivilege, SeRemoteLogonRight, etc.

name: SecureRemoteAccess
description: PowerShell script to harden Windows remote access - disable RDP, Remote Assistance, block RDP/VNC/TeamViewer/AnyDesk ports, disable Administrator account, restrict remote software, disable UPnP, enable Defender.

name: Retaliate
description: PowerShell threat response/retaliation script - automated response to detected threats (part of GSecurity suite).

name: Riddance
description: Batch script to remove non-current local user accounts - parses and , deletes users whose RID does not match current user. Enables UAC (EnableLUA=1).

name: PiHole
description: PowerShell system-wide ad blocker for Windows - uses DNS policy and persistent routes. Downloads EasyList, EasyPrivacy, AdGuard filters.

name: PreventRemoteConnections
description: PowerShell script to block all remote access - RDP, Remote Assistance, PSRemoting, WinRM, Telnet, SMB, Wake-on-LAN, SSH, VNC, UPnP. Adds firewall rules.

name: PDQ
description: PDQ Deploy/Inventory or similar - batch script for software deployment or system management.

name: Password
description: One script, run once as Administrator-no input. Sets up password rotation so the user can log in with Enter (or auto-login); the password is randomized after 1 minute and every 10 minutes, then set back to blank at logoff.

name: Pac
description: PAC (Proxy Auto-Config) file or scripts - used for ad blocking (see ads-blocker/Pac) or proxy configuration.

name: Ozempic
description: Batch script - Windows Update / SoftwareDistribution cleanup - stops wuauserv/BITS, deletes SoftwareDistribution, DISM component cleanup, ResetBase.

name: NetworkTrafficMonitor
description: Browser-focused network traffic monitor - allows user-navigated domains + dependencies; blocks other connections. Creates firewall rules.

name: Null
description: PowerShell script to disable NULL sessions for SMB - RestrictAnonymous, RestrictNullSessAccess. Also sets battery power plan.

name: NetworkDebloat
description: PowerShell script to disable unwanted network bindings - File Sharing, MS Client, QoS, LLTD, IPv6, etc. Runs at startup as SYSTEM.

name: NetworkRepair
description: Batch script for network repair - NLA probing, BFE/Dnscache/MpsSvc/DHCP/DUSM services, adapter disable/enable cycle.

name: Network
description: Batch script for network registry and service configuration - SetACL on Network key, devcon, backup permissions, DHCP, DUSM, NLA, etc.

name: Love4Free
description: PHP web application - profile system with install, database, helpers, create_profile.

name: Midas
description: PowerShell FileSystemWatcher that locks down permissions on new/changed files in Users, Program Files - Console Logon (S-1-2-1) only.

name: MiniFilterDrivers
description: Batch script to unload and remove BFS and UnionFS minifilter drivers - , takeown, icacls, delete.

name: GorstaksAI
description: - Try it live

name: LNKProtection
description: PowerShell script that removes shortcuts (.lnk) pointing to network paths () - protects against UNC path abuse and SMB attacks.

name: JetCleanup
description: Registry tweak to remove Explorer/Windows bloat - AppEvents schemes, Explorer sounds, Control Panel clutter, personalization keys, Bluetooth, Quick Actions, etc.

name: KeyScrambler
description: An anti-keylogger protection tool that injects random fake keystrokes to poison captured data - you type normally, keyloggers see garbage.

name: IPBlock
description: PowerShell script to download malware blocklists and block IPs via Windows Firewall - Spamhaus DROP, Emerging Threats, Zeus/Feodo Trackers, Talos, FireHOL.

name: Infinity
description: Infinity.BS - Game script/module (likely Blizzard/StarCraft related). Contains trigger/script definitions.

name: Immunity
description: Registry tweak with P3P (Platform for Privacy Preferences) blocklist - blocks tracking/ad domains (180solutions, 2every, ad networks, etc.) in Internet Settings.

name: GVPN
description: Python script to connect to free VPN servers from VPNGate API - selects closest server by ping, uses Windows for connection.

name: GTalk
description: P2P chat - Python client, server, peer scripts for chat/messaging.

name: Guard
description: PowerShell antivirus/EDR-style guard - file monitoring, hash scanning, CIRCL/MalwareBazaar lookups, quarantine, scheduled task persistence.

name: GSecurity
description: A comprehensive Windows security hardening and protection suite - enterprise-grade EDR, 70+ modules, automated threat response

name: GShield
description: Lightweight Windows Security Toolkit - PowerShell-based antivirus and threat detection with real-time monitoring and behavioral analysis

name: GSecurityBaseline
description: Windows Security Baseline - Group Policy templates and scripts for export/import of security policies.

name: GRun
description: Python script to run executables in a sandbox - uses Wine (Linux/macOS) and Docker for Windows/Linux game isolation.

name: GRules
description: PowerShell security rules manager - downloads and applies YARA, Sigma, Snort rules; enforces ASR (Attack Surface Reduction) rules.

name: GPerf
description: PowerShell performance tweak utility - CPU, memory, network, BCD, power plan, and Explorer optimizations.

name: GFocus
description: Browser-focused network traffic monitor - allows user-navigated URLs + dependencies; blocks unauthorized connections. Creates firewall rules per-connection.

name: GBrowser
description: A lightweight, privacy-focused web browser built with Python and PyQt6 - featuring tabbed browsing, built-in ad blocking, credential management, and DLL injection protection.

name: GEDR
description: Gorstak Endpoint Detection and Response - detection & hardening modules, hash lookup, YARA scanning, behavioral detection, WMI protection

name: GamingScripts
description: Gaming-related PowerShell and Python scripts - Bufferbloat, savegame backup/restore, Infinity.BS, and more.

name: Firewall
description: Registry tweak to configure Windows Firewall - SharedAccess service, domain/private profiles, Remote Admin, File & Print, RDP, UPnP.

name: GameCache
description: Multi-tier caching system for gaming performance - RAM + SSD tiers, LRU eviction, symlinks for Steam/Epic games.

name: ElfCatcher
description: PowerShell script that detects and unloads (ELF-similar) DLLs injected into browsers - protection against surveillance/injection.

name: ES
description: PowerShell script that terminates non-console RDP/session logins - keeps only console (local) sessions. Runs as a background job every 5 seconds.

name: DriverWatcher
description: PowerShell script to monitor and remove unauthorized drivers - whitelists Microsoft, Realtek, Dolby, Intel, AMD, NVIDIA, MediaTek; removes all others.

name: DevicesFiltering
description: PowerShell script to list devices and set permissions using SetACL - restricts device registry access to Console Logon group only.

name: DNSDoTDoH
description: Windows Encrypted DNS Configurator - PowerShell script for DNS over HTTPS (DoH) and DNS over TLS (DoT) with Cloudflare (primary) and Google (secondary).

name: DebloatPresets
description: Windows ISO debloat presets - NTLite, WinReducer, custom workflows for creating lightweight Windows installs.

name: Creds
description: PowerShell script to harden local credential protection - LSASS PPL, credential caching, and cached logon controls.

name: CrudePayloadGuard
description: PowerShell script that monitors active TCP connections for hostnames containing - crude XSS/injection payload guard.

name: CPythonWrapper
description: Wrapper or bridge for CPython - C/Python integration utilities.

name: Corrupt
description: PowerShell script to overwrite telemetry files with random data on an hourly schedule - privacy-focused telemetry corruption.

name: CookieMonitor
description: PowerShell utility to backup, monitor, and reset Chrome cookie databases - with scheduled tasks for logon, startup, and periodic checks.

name: CleanGuard
description: Real-time file monitor for , , , - uses CIRCL (whitelist) and MalwareBazaar (blacklist), no VirusTotal.

name: BrowserNetworkGuard
description: PowerShell local proxy that blocks all network connections except user-entered URLs and their dependencies - protecting against telemetry and unauthorized phone-homes.

name: Browsers
description: PowerShell script to apply privacy and security settings to Chromium-based browsers (Chrome, Edge, etc.) - WebRTC, remote desktop, and plugins.

name: Benchmark
description: A comprehensive system benchmarking tool written entirely in PowerShell - test your CPU, Memory, Disk, GPU, and Network performance with a single script.

name: AutoHotkey
description: AutoHotkey scripts - includes MuteDiscord.ahk for Discord mute control.

name: AgentsAntivirus
description: Standalone Security Detection Agents - PowerShell agents from GEDR, zero dependencies, run anywhere

name: ExperienceNormalizer
description: Windows audio tool that captures, normalizes, and enhances system audio in real-time

name: Antivirus
description: Single-file, zero-dependency real-time antivirus and EDR for Windows with 67+ detection modules, MITRE ATT&CK mapping, and automated threat response

name: YoutubeAdsBlocker
description: Automated PowerShell script that configures YouTube ad blocking with zero user interaction required. Combines network-level blocking (PAC file) with JavaScript injection (local proxy) for comprehensive ad removal.

name: Unhooker
description: Advanced Windows API Unhooking Tool for Windows 11 26H1

name: UniversalTime
description: HTML page for universal/world time display or timezone conversion.

name: SysmonFull
description: Author: Gorstak | Part of the GEDR Security Suite

name: Store
description: Windows Store configuration, scripts, or debloat utilities.

name: Services
description: Windows service configuration, management, or hardening scripts.

name: ScreenSaver
description: Screen saver configuration or custom screen saver for Windows.

name: Restrictions
description: Registry/Group Policy or script-based restrictions for Windows.

name: Rainmeter
description: Rainmeter skins, layouts, or configuration for the Rainmeter desktop customization tool.

name: ProxyRotation
description: Python script to fetch and rotate HTTP/HTTPS proxies from free proxy lists (ProxyScrape, free-proxy-list.net, etc.).

name: Provisioning
description: Windows provisioning and setup scripts/packages.

name: Notes
description: Notes and documentation for Gorstak projects.

name: MscScripts
description: Microsoft Management Console (MSC) scripts or console snap-in configurations.

name: Hardening
description: A comprehensive PowerShell script designed to harden Windows systems against common attack vectors, including those commonly seen in penetration testing platforms like HackTheBox. This script implements defense-in-depth security measures to protect against unauthorized access, credential theft, privilege escalation, and lateral movement attacks.

name: GS
description: Batch script to import security policy via LGPO (Local Group Policy Object) using .

name: GPrep
description: | Feature | Description |

name: GKodi
description: PowerShell script to download, install, and configure Kodi with addon repositories (The Crew, Venom, Seren).

name: GeoBlockBypass
description: Registry tweak to bypass geographic/geo-blocking for applications or network services.

name: DragonBreathHunter
description: PowerShell detection and mitigation script for RONINGLOADER and Gh0st RAT (Dragon Breath campaign).

name: DisableTrash
description: Registry tweak to disable the Recycle Bin and enable confirm-on-delete for permanent file deletion.

name: CScripts
description: C scripts or C-based utilities for Gorstak projects.

name: CustomControlsRemover
description: PowerShell script to detect and remove InProcServer32/InprocHandler32 custom controls from the registry (WOW6432Node CLSID).

name: Consent
description: Batch script to modify UAC Consent behavior and permissions on Windows.

name: COMList
description: Registry tweak for COM (Component Object Model) configuration on Windows.

name: Certs
description: Registry tweak for certificate or TLS/SSL configuration on Windows.

name: Browser
description: C# WPF browser application using WebView2, with tabs, bookmarks, history, downloads, and extensions.

name: BFE
description: Registry tweak to configure Windows Base Filtering Engine firewall service parameters.

name: Bios
description: Batch script to apply BCD (Boot Configuration Data) tweaks that affect low-level boot and virtualization settings.

name: BCDCleanup
description: PowerShell script to enumerate and clean suspicious Boot Configuration Data (BCD) entries on Windows.

name: Backup
description: Python script to flatten a folder structure by moving all files from subfolders into a single target directory with deduplicated filenames.

name: AutorunsEnhanced
description: Author: Gorstak | Part of the GEDR Security Suite

name: BabylonianTime
description: HTML page for Babylonian or alternative time system display.

name: Audio
description: Windows PowerShell utility to enable Acoustic Echo Cancellation (AEC) and Noise Suppression on all audio devices.
